summary: First-iteration smoke testing of Nexar (FastAPI + React + Claude Sonnet 4.5). All 14 backend endpoints pass (health, signup, login, /auth/me, analyze with Claude in ~42s, GET /reports, GET /reports/{id}, bookmark toggle, trending scams/products, stats, chat, community reviews POST/GET, community scams POST). Frontend landing, login -> dashboard, report detail page, and chat drawer all render correctly with full AI integration.
passed: POST /api/analyze (auth) -> 200 in ~42s. trust=92 risk=15 value=78 recommendation=buy, 9 pros / 7 cons / 5 alternatives, full data keys present
GET /api/reports (auth) -> 200 returns array linked to user
Frontend / loads (hero search, login/signup nav, features visible)
Dashboard renders: 'Welcome back, Test.', recent analyses (AirPods Trust 92 BUY, Tesla Trust 98 BUY), saved reports, trending sections, plan=Free
Report page renders: Trust 92/100, Risk 15/100, Value 78/100, BUY badge, pros & cons lists, Saved/Share buttons, recommendation tagline
Chat drawer: opens, sends message, Claude reply rendered in chat bubbles (11s)

failed.issue: Emergent 'Made with Emergent' badge (id=emergent-badge) overlays the floating chat button at bottom-right and intercepts pointer events on standard Playwright clicks. JS .click() / force=true via evaluate works fine; real users on small screens may also experience this overlap.
failed.evidence: Playwright: '<a id="emergent-badge"> intercepts pointer events' on [data-testid=chat-open-btn]. Worked after page.evaluate(...).click().

failed.issue: Page <title> still shows 'Emergent | Fullstack App' instead of Nexar branding.

action_items: Optional: bump chat-open-btn bottom offset (e.g., bottom-20) or z-index above the Emergent badge so it never overlaps.
Optional: update <title> in /app/frontend/public/index.html to 'Nexar - AI Decision Engine'.
